summary: Moderate security posture. 2 high-severity injection risks and 3 hardcoded secrets detected. Input validation covers 68% of entry points.

owasp_findings.description: SQL query built with string concatenation using user input
owasp_findings.evidence: query = f"SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = '{request.args.get('name')}'"
owasp_findings.remediation: Use parameterized queries: cursor.execute('SELECT * FROM users WHERE name = %s', (name,))

owasp_findings.description: User input rendered without escaping in template
owasp_findings.remediation: Remove the | safe filter or sanitize the bio field before storage

unvalidated_entries.description: File type not validated before processing

issues: Admin export endpoint has no authentication middleware

recommendations.title: Fix SQL injection in search endpoint
recommendations.description: Replace string concatenation with parameterized queries in src/api/search.py

recommendations.title: Remove hardcoded API keys from source
recommendations.description: Move STRIPE_API_KEY to environment variables or secret manager
